success_factors: Workflow completed end-to-end with status=success across all expected nodes (download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize).
Import-based adapter strategy matched repository characteristics (high import feasibility 0.88, low intrusiveness risk), enabling non-invasive service wrapping.
MCP plugin started successfully and passed health validation (service_health=healthy, transport=stdio).
Core domain endpoints were generated for high-value APIs (molecule, ucc/hea family, Hamiltonian helpers, backend controls).
Repository structure was analyzable despite fallback ingestion mode (zip fallback succeeded with 76 files indexed).
failure_reasons: No hard execution failures were reported.
Quality signal gap: original project tests were not passing in this run context (original_project.passed=false), limiting confidence in full functional equivalence.
Observability gap: node-level timings and runtime performance counters were not captured (all perf metrics reported as 0/empty).
DeepWiki enrichment failed, reducing external semantic/context augmentation for generation review.

node_performance.download_time: Completed successfully; exact node duration unavailable. Repository import used zip fallback and still produced full file inventory.
node_performance.analysis_time: Completed successfully; medium complexity and low risk profile established; DeepWiki sub-step failed but did not block pipeline.
node_performance.generation_time: Completed successfully; 7 MCP output files generated, import adapter selected, and 10 practical endpoints exposed.
node_performance.test_time: MCP plugin validation passed (healthy). Original project test status reported as failed/unknown-context, indicating incomplete baseline verification.
